title: hicorius alba var. maxima
intro: Hicorius alba var. maxima, also known as the large white hawthorn, is a large shrub or small tree belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The medicinal properties of Hicorius alba var. maxima lie in its berries and flowers, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to support cardiovascular health. The health benefits of this plant include reducing blood pressure, improving circulation, and lowering cholesterol levels, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies aimed at promoting heart health. Hicorius alba var. maxima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
